phase-summary.outcome: Space View now directly selects all available spaces (All Content, Combined, Skill, Dialogue, Archetype, Action, Event, Effect). The separate Content Space step was removed.

file.description: Replaced `contentSpaceMode` flow with direct runtime-space modes; added content-space filters and unified content/nearest calculations by selected space.
Added completed task `44-08` with validation commands.
Phase 44 plan list extended with `44-08` single-step selection pass.

decision.summary: Remove redundant two-step selection by making each space a first-class space-view option.
decision.impact: Lower cognitive overhead and faster context switching for authoring and debugging loops.

tests.test: `pnpm --dir docs-site exec tsc --noEmit` (fails due unrelated pre-existing type errors in `app/dungeonbreak-content-app/dungeon-explorer/page.tsx`).

next.action: Optional: add compact per-space count badges to Space View buttons for faster discovery.
